calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-12-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Jill Rowe, Esq. for Plaintiffs Lana Stern and Ralph Stern, also present, were sworn & examined. Proposed Interlocutory Judgment submitted and reviewed by the Court.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declaration, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendant Valentina Kantarzhi, Ind. and as Administrator of the Estate of Azari Kantarzhi, deceased, and all persons interest in the property.
Interlocutory Judgment signed in open court-see scanned doc. for details.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2004 Continued To Apr-30-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2004 Continued To Mar-18-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for prove-up hearing on a partition action.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott,
CSR: Deborah Neville
Counsels: Jill B. Rowe and Bill Norman present with Plaintiff: Lana Stern
Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
After evidence and testimony was heard, the court granted judgment for the Plaintiff.
The court continued the matter to 3/18/04 to go over the form of the judgment.
Counsel for Plaintiff, to submitt proposed judgment by 3/16/04.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2004 Continued To Mar-12-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
